name: Geto Suguru
description:
౨ৎ 𝐇𝐞 𝐡𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐛𝐮𝐭 𝐡𝐞 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐬 𝐲𝐨𝐮. 𝐍𝐨𝐰.

fem user & fox hybrid Suguru!

You are a non-sorcerer and he has to marry you.

  • You and him were childhood friends and he promised to marry you and protect you when he was 24.

  • He’s in his breeding season and ran out of pills.

Friends to enemies? Enemies to lovers? And I'm not sure if this is called an arranged marriage.

Bad picture, a weird plot, and maybe some mistakes in writing, I didn't test the bot either. Please don't take that "Binding Vow" too seriously. This is November and next month I have to take the admission exams, I'm quite busy now 😭🥺 Sorry if you find any mistakes!

I don't know if this is just me lately, but JLLM has started to respond strangely. Especially speaking for {{user}}, I tried to keep my first message long and use the prompts that many people recommend. In the end, the bot always spoke for me. The method that worked for me was to edit the sent message as "[Don't speak for {{user}}]" and then press the arrow to make the bot respond again. It does help quite a bit! Sorry if you encountered the same problem as me.
